description: Verify pixel-art sprites render correctly in the office simulation game at /game (HQ). Both character sprites and environment sprites have been replaced from text/emoji placeholders to programmatic Canvas 2D drawings.
checklist: Navigate to /game -- office grid loads with all 10 tile types visible
Five agent desks show pixel-art sitting figures (not letters A/S/M/X/P)
Agent colors are distinguishable: Alex=blue, Sarah=purple, Morgan=green, Marcus=orange, Priya=pink
Floor tiles show subtle grout-line grid pattern (faint cross dividing into quadrants)
Wall tiles show brick bond pattern with baseboard stripe at bottom
CEO desk shows mahogany desk with monitor and gold star accents
Conference tiles show wood table with 6 chair indicator squares
Whiteboard shows frame with colored sticky notes and marker tray
Mailbox shows blue post box with red flag
Bell shows stacked-rect dome shape with handle
Server room shows dark rack with vent lines and green/amber LED dots
Door shows wooden door with panels and gold doorknob
Zoom in (scroll wheel) -- pixel art scales crisply at 2x and 4x (no blurring)
Click on interactive tiles still opens side panel
Hover highlights still appear on interactive tiles
marcus_review_notes: CEO desk has no status/sprite system (intentional -- it is the player's desk)
No chair-back behind sitting characters (cosmetic gap for future polish)
Floor grout lines may appear thick at 4x zoom (known, not a blocker)
Conference tile shows no occupancy state (acceptable for v1)
